welcome.title: Welcome to Life To Do
welcome.subtitle: Get things out of your head and into a trusted system.

steps.capture: Capture everything. If it's on your mind, put it in the Inbox.
steps.clarify: Process your inbox. Decide what the very next action is.
steps.organize: Put it where it belongs. Projects, Someday/Maybe, or Trash.
steps.review: Review weekly. Keep your system clean and trusted.
steps.engage: Do. Pick the best action based on your context and energy.
